recommendations.title: Palm Springs
recommendations.overview: When carefree Nyles and reluctant maid of honor Sarah have a chance encounter at a Palm Springs wedding, things get complicated when they find themselves unable to escape the venue, themselves, or each other.

recommendations.title: Hungry Hearts
recommendations.overview: The relationship of a couple who meet by chance in New York City is put to the test when they encounter a life or death circumstance.

recommendations.title: I Give It a Year
recommendations.overview: After a quick courtship, two lovers hastily decide to tie the knot. As their first year of marriage unfolds, temptation and incompatibility put their relationship in jeopardy.

recommendations.title: Hotel Chevalier
recommendations.overview: In a Paris hotel room, Jack Whitman lies on a bed. His phone rings; it's a woman on her way to see him, a surprise. She arrives and the complications of their relationship emerge in bits and pieces. Will they make love? Is their relationship over? (A

recommendations.title: The Third One
recommendations.overview: After meeting in a chat room, Fede arrives at a down- town building to have an intimate encounter with a gay couple older than him. As the night unfolds, Fede has an intense and telling experience. The next morning finds him different, as if suddenly

recommendations.title: Godzilla Against MechaGodzilla
recommendations.overview: JSDF pilot Akane has a fateful encounter when a new Godzilla emerges in Tateyama. As a countermeasure, a cyborg named Kiryu is constructed from the remains of the original. The machine is discovered to harbor the restless soul of the original monster

recommendations.title: Ana e Vitória
recommendations.overview: Two girls have a chance encounter and instantly befriend. While trying to find themselves, they decide to pursue music together.

recommendations.title: Fermat's Room
recommendations.overview: Four mathematicians are imprisoned in a shrinking room; with the walls closing in, they must try anything to escape this fatal puzzle.

recommendations.title: Anatomy of a Love Seen
recommendations.overview: A film within a film that explores love in all its painful and messy glory.  Six months ago Zoe and Mal fell for each other while filming a love scene, which led to an intense, whirlwind affair, followed by a devastating breakup. Soon after their spl

recommendations.title: Escape from the 21st Century
recommendations.overview: Three friends discover that they have the power to travel back and forth 20 years with a sneeze. However, the future is not as good as they hope, and they need to take on the responsibility of saving the world.
